sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94341" key="siteu/simos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῑτ-εύσιμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n94341.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for feeding</tr_>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ ς</foreign>. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a fowl stuffed for the table</tr_>, Lemma to <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.484</biblScope> </bibl> and <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">486</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
